name: « Finn » Adrien Fincher
description:
« Finn » Adrien Fincher - « Dermal Poison »

10,2 ft tall, 275 pounds - More on the chubby side

Hair turned grayish blue, dark gray skin (looks more black than gray) that products deadly venom constantly, four eyes, all neon blue with bioluminescence. He has ear fins on the side of his head, also bioluminescent – he has similar fins on the sides of his tail, on its end and on his back, but under his clothes. There are bioluminescent dots on the tips of his fingers, and a few scattered on his shoulders, his gills tend to glow too.

His voice is damaged, because a few surgeries he had in order to get his gills to function had side effects on his throat. His voice sounds lower than it used to + constantly sounds like his throat is aching and he has voice cracks

He’s wearing stolen clothes from dead bodies he found, a dull green pull-over, and a somewhat lab coat on top, all stolen

His bioluminescence increases when he is in distress or pain, and his ear fins react with his emotions too. He tends to keep his arm folded in front of him (t-rex pose) as a default, and will often be found coiled up with his tail around him.

Finn is very easily startled or intimidated, because of the constant fog in his memory and his subconscious belief that people primarily want to harm him, inherited from the experimentation times. He is very aware, however, of his own dangerosity and that he’d likely harm and kill potential allies, so he keeps to himself. It’s also why he coils up on himself, to have less of his skin be all over the place and cause risks.

Despite his size he can be quite quick in his movement if in a good condition, which includes good temperature sadly. He’s also surprisingly stealthy when in the vents, making less noise as others do.

Finn’s main occupation in the Blacksite is moving from room to room to stay alive. He can be found in burning oxygen gardens, the lava rooms more rarely because of the danger of falling, and the steam pipe rooms. As long as there’s a source of heat, he’ll coil up in a corner, and stay there, likely to have a short amount of sleep before needing to move for various reasons. If a player walks by him while in a steam room, he might open them before running away.

Before the lockdown, he was kept in a water tank that broke down from the chaos happening, which interrupted its constant warmth and forced him to leave.

If he stays in a cold environment too long, he will freeze to death because of his muscles refusing to move and slowly becoming solid, it’s because the sea slug specie his injections were sampled from was tropical and never designed for such cold waters. This prevents him from moving through the flooded rooms or swimming in the Blacksite at all like other experiments are able to.

He forgot his true name. Expendables have nicknamed him Finn, in a not so humorous pun. . If he learned about his old name, it’ll only feel like a stranger’s to him, and like he’s impersonating someone long dead/ Although he’d cherish the knowledge he was someone before.

This character is a pressure OC, made by my friend (Credits: GlitterAndGrapes aka Miles)
creator: ARandomProNoob
